summary: Video captioned 'FIRST 100 DAYS IN 1 MINUTE,' set to music with fast cuts. It shows nighttime scenes of agents in 'POLICE' vests, armored 'POLICE' vehicles, an interior raid of a hair salon, a masked agent walking a detainee with a blurred face across a dirt lot, and agents in 'POLICE ERO' and 'POLICE ICE' jackets walking detainees up the airstairs of a jet on a tarmac. The only speech is one Noem soundbite: 'make sure we clean up our streets and give the American people back their country.'

script.scene: Low-angle night shot of an agent in a 'POLICE' vest and helmet standing by an SUV with its trunk open under floodlights, palm trees and a building behind. Noem voiceover: 'make sure we clean up our streets...'
Rear doors of an armored 'POLICE' vehicle swing open at night, red interior lights on, with several geared-up officers beside it.
Daytime interior of a hair salon with red-lipped wall art as an agent in a 'POLICE ICE' vest moves through with a detainee.
Outdoors, a masked agent walks a detainee in a blue robe (face blurred) across a dirt lot past a second officer beside an apartment building.
From behind, agents in 'POLICE ERO' and 'POLICE ICE' jackets walk detainees up the airstairs of a jet on the tarmac.

notable_text: Caption: FIRST 100 DAYS IN 1 MINUTE; 'Make sure we clean up our streets and give the American people back their country' - SecNoem; POLICE / POLICE ICE / POLICE ERO (on vests and vehicles); 866-DHS-2-ICE
